branch_prefix_policy: Do not use codex/ for this repository.

retention_policy.claude_directory: Keep only current agent context and stable runtime rules.
retention_policy.historical_versions: Use docs and Git tags instead of per-version Claude skill files.
retention_policy.reason: Reduce prompt tokens, stale paths, and historical context confusion during future development.

version_ranges.name: Safe Patch Runtime
version_ranges.notes: Minimal patch proposal, preview, checkpoint, audit, rollback loop.

version_ranges.name: Permissioned Shell Runtime
version_ranges.notes: Controlled command execution with risk classification and audit.

version_ranges.name: Long-running State
version_ranges.notes: Project rules, progress, hooks, lightweight memory.

version_ranges.name: Skills + Tool Registry
version_ranges.notes: Skill directory and internal tool registry.

version_ranges.name: MCP Integration
version_ranges.notes: MCP config and discovery; real execution deferred until safety boundaries are ready.

version_ranges.name: Sandbox / Containment
version_ranges.notes: Filesystem, network, and sandbox policy boundaries.

version_ranges.name: Subagents
version_ranges.notes: Task model, result files, readonly subagents, merge review.

version_ranges.name: Observability + Evaluation
version_ranges.notes: Trace events, evaluation suite, reports, failure taxonomy.

version_ranges.name: Stable Local Agent Runtime
version_ranges.notes: Stable CLI, packaging, docs, security presets, release demo.

version_ranges.name: Product Extension Layer
version_ranges.notes: Local API facade, export, task queue, IDE manifest, release checklist.

version_ranges.name: Production Hardening
version_ranges.notes: Shell hardening, trusted policy, sandbox enforcement, real LLM, deployment.

version_ranges.name: Runtime Trust Refinement
version_ranges.notes: Context secret filtering, hook trust, LLM network policy, trace/audit integration.

version_ranges.name: Runtime Operations
version_ranges.notes: Runtime logs, debugging commands, failure diagnostics.

version_ranges.name: Core Security Boundary
version_ranges.notes: Security boundary fixes across context, apply, command policy, hooks, audit.

version_ranges.name: Controlled Tooling and Subagents
version_ranges.notes: Controlled MCP execution, subagent runner, merge review, sandbox capability research.

version_ranges.name: OS-Level Sandbox Containment
version_ranges.notes: Sandbox adapters, plans, approval gate, preflight security evaluations.

version_ranges.name: Local Policy-Gated Sandbox Execution
version_ranges.notes: Noop adapter executes commands through SafeCode logical boundaries when all preflight checks pass. macOS/Linux/Docker backends remain dry-run. Result maintenance includes stats, safe prune, and confirmed-prune audit.
